_README: Synthetic Railgun event fixture for indexer integration tests. Each entry mirrors the alloy::rpc::types::eth::Log shape (just the fields the decoder needs). Topic-0 hashes are alloy-computed at S006 close (see M010); S007 fixture-decode test reconciles by attempting to decode against alloy::sol_types::SolEvent and asserting structural correctness, not byte-equality with one specific sample.
_source: Recon agent 6 (S005) captured 13 events from Sepolia post-PPOI-launch (block 5944700 + 100k). The data here is the structural shape - the decoder asserts the bytes round-trip cleanly, not that any particular log is on Sepolia today.

logs._label: Unshield event - to + token + amount + fee
logs.data_hex_descriptor: abi.encode(address to, TokenData token, uint256 amount, uint256 fee)

logs._reconciliation_note: S007 fixture decode against alloy SolEvent will reveal which struct shape produces the on-chain hash; if neither matches, the contract source we're reading from is a different version. Recon agent 6 captured Sepolia logs with ~5 Shield/Transact-shaped events; the actual on-chain topic[0] from those logs is the authoritative answer.
logs.data_hex_descriptor: abi.encode(uint256 treeNumber, uint256 startPosition, CommitmentPreimage[] commitments, ShieldCiphertext[] shieldCiphertext, uint256[] fees)
abi.encode(uint256 treeNumber, uint256 startPosition, bytes32[] hash, CommitmentCiphertext[] ciphertext)
